required_contains.text: Neuron registration is continuous on ordinary subnets such as netuid 1. There are no interval-based
registration windows; admission is priced through a burn that decays between registrations and rises
with each successful registration through `BurnHalfLife` and `BurnIncreaseMult`
That continuity still leaves a per-block success cap. `MaxRegistrationsPerBlock` limits how many
registrations can succeed on a netuid in the current block; when the block counter is full,

forbidden_contains.text: Neuron registration is continuous on ordinary subnets. There are no registration windows, rate
limits, or per-block caps on the admission action itself. Admission is governed by a burn price that
